events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: this is a **fail**, **critical** risk. Venting trapped pressure directly at face level indicates the isolation/PPE/vent-routing steps in the manifold sequence were skipped or done out of order. Work must stop immediately — vent valve closed, block/equalizing valve isolation reverified, vent rerouted away from personnel, PPE donned, then pressure bled off slowly and confirmed at zero before manifold work resumes.
